texts.text: *ALL DIMENSIONS ARE FROM FINISHED WALL TO FINISHED WALL
*ALL DIMENSIONS ARE FROM FINISHED FLOOR TO FINISHED CEILING
*NOT INCLUDED: APPLIANCES, FIXTURES, PLUMBING, AND COUNTER TOPS
*ITS ARCHITECTS RESPONSIBILITY TO CONFIRM KITCHEN & VANITY CABINETS
COMPLY WITH BUILDING FHA & ADA CODES.
